home.title: Start a Retrospective
home.subtitle: Create a board and share the link with your team.
home.note: No signup required. Anyone with the link can participate.
home.join.placeholder: Paste a link or board code
summary.title: Summary
summary.empty: No cards yet. Add some cards to see the summary.
export.title: Export
admin.banner.title: You created this board
admin.banner.desc: Save the link below — it's the only way to manage the timer and delete the board from another device or browser.
admin.banner.saved: Saved? Then you can close this.
copy.title: Link
space.title: Spaces
space.subtitle: Group your retros in one place to track progress over time.
space.create.name: Space name
space.join.placeholder: Paste a link or space code
space.password.title: Enter password
space.boards.title: Boards
space.boards.empty: No boards yet. Create the first one!
space.admin.title: You created this space
space.admin.desc: Save the link below — it's the only way to delete the space from another device or browser.
name.title: How should we call you?
name.desc: Your name will appear on cards you create
onboarding.share.title: Share this board with your team
onboarding.share.desc: Click the link icon to copy the board URL. Anyone with the link can participate.
onboarding.cards.title: Add cards to each column
onboarding.cards.desc: Share what went well, what didn't, and what to improve.
onboarding.vote.title: Vote and discuss
onboarding.vote.desc: Upvote important items. The summary ranks cards by votes.
